Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: Team preps survivor '63 Galaxie for 1/2 mile top-speed assault, installing our turbo’d Black & Blue 347.
Video.title: Galaxie Teardown

Video.summary: A '63 Galaxie is rolled into the shop and fitted with the 347 turbo known as "Little Black & Blue."
Video.title: Galaxie Time Capsule

Video.summary: Team continues the transformation of its turbocharged ’63 Galaxie into a top-speed terror.
Video.title: Battlestar Galaxie

Video.summary: Team installs 200-mph capable suspension on its 1,000-hp '63 Galaxie
Video.title: Half-Mile Hauler

Video.summary: Mike and Pat have their hands full with the finishing touches on project white fright.
Video.title: The Galaxie’s Final Frontier

Video.summary: The Engine Power team takes a '73 Split-Bumper Chevy Camaro and turns it into a triple threat car.
Video.title: Triple Threat Camaro

Video.summary: Transforming a junkyard Ford flathead into a classic hot rod V8.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Image.alt: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Video.summary: Engine guru Keith Dorton helps build our Ford flathead with 3/4 race cam, high compression heads and 3 deuces.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: 3 Deuce V8

Video.summary: How-to build a modern Chevy stroker starting from scratch with an LQ4 iron truck block.
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Video.summary: The latest GenX cylinder heads are flowed, installed and topped off with multi-port fuel injection
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Video.summary: How to turbo-charge an iron block LS stroker to make 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: Iron Animal 408: Wicked Turbo Power

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We take a '89 full size 4x4 Chevy Blazer on a trail ride, then tear it down and build the ultimate truck.
Video.title: Klassy K5

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: The guys visit DBR Performance and their first chance ever to drive a Jeep TrackHawk.
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: Our Jeep TrashHawk gets the upgraded axles, brakes, and suspension it will need to handle 707 horses.
Video.title: Suspension of Jeep Belief

Video.summary: It’s time for some high performance fun at the National Corvette Museum Motorsports Park track.
Video.title: Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track

Image.alt: Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track
Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track
Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track

Video.summary: This is a complete thrash as we turn a Jeep Wagoneer into a 700+ horsepower, two-wheel drive monster.
Video.title: Jeep “TrashHawk” Readies for the Speedway

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: We build the foundation of a stroker LS that would be a PERFECT fit for a hot rod!
Video.title: Pro LS Bottom End Build

Video.summary: We complete our stroker LS powerplant and put it to the ultimate performance test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Pro LS on the Dyno

Video.summary: As part of the Motorsports Team, students at UNOH build high-performance dirt race cars.
Video.title: From Classroom to Circle Track

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: Assembly on the 4.3L engine begins with a solid bottom end.
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 Bottom End Build

Video.summary: The 4.3L engine shows what it can do in the dyno cell!
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 on the Dyno

Video.summary: We crank up the power on our old-school GM 4.3L V6 with some turbocharged forced induction.
Video.title: Turbocharging the GM 4.3L V6

Video.summary: Our Big Block Chevy gets ready for life inside a high-revving hot rod.
Video.title: Hot Rod Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, we’ll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens
